metadata.scope: J/K/L group round 3 six-match 75 RMB discussion-only portfolio
source_files: 赔率与投注/购彩方案组合标准_20260625.md

hard_gate_failures.gate: latest injury, suspension and minutes limits

hard_gate_failures.status: partial local and online snapshots only

hard_gate_failures.gate: same-source markets for all used plays

hard_gate_failures.detail: Combined JKL red-team verdict is hold_not_executable; individual J/K/L red-team gates remain hold or betting-hold.

odds_source_note.primary_snapshot: 500.com local snapshot / China Sports Lottery cross-check
odds_source_note.conflict_note: Local 500 snapshot and online recheck contain conflicting same-market prices for multiple matches; all payout numbers are discussion references.

legs.settlement_condition: Jordan real win or draw, or Argentina wins by exactly 1 goal.
legs.model_support: Model mapping gives Jordan +2 handicap win 55.7% versus market no-vig 38.8%; this is a margin bucket, not an ordinary 1X2 statement.

hit_conditions: Jordan avoid defeat, or Argentina win by exactly one goal.
failure_conditions: Argentina win by two or more goals.
maximum_risk_points: Argentina rotation and late transition tail can move the margin from small win into two-plus.
Ordinary 1X2 is not open, so market calibration is incomplete.

portfolio_reference.ticket_name: Colombia plus-one with Ghana result resistance

legs.model_support: Model mapping gives Colombia +1 handicap win 55.9% versus market no-vig 46.6%.

legs.settlement_condition: Croatia real draw or Ghana real win.
legs.model_support: Model top scores include 0-0, 1-1 and 0-1 near the leading cluster; Croatia one-goal win and two-plus win are separate settlement layers.

hit_conditions: Colombia do not lose to Portugal.
maximum_risk_points: This ticket leans against two market favorites and can fail if favorite quality converts early.
Croatia-Ghana has late incentive volatility; a Croatia chase state can break the Ghana result-resistance leg.

portfolio_reference.ticket_name: Panama plus-two with DR Congo margin resistance

legs.settlement_condition: Panama real win or draw, or England wins by exactly 1 goal.
legs.model_support: Model mapping gives Panama +2 handicap win 59.8%; England win direction is not the same as England winning by two or more.

legs.settlement_condition: DR Congo real draw or Uzbekistan real win.
legs.model_support: Model mapping gives this margin bucket 51.2%, reflecting high draw and chase-tail uncertainty rather than a direct 1X2 direction.

hit_conditions: England win by at most one goal, or fail to win.
DR Congo do not win the real match.
failure_conditions: England win by two or more goals.
DR Congo win the real match.
maximum_risk_points: Both legs are margin-sensitive and can be invalidated by early goals.
Panama ordinary 1X2 is not open and England lineups are highly material.

legs.model_support: Exact-margin bucket from model mapping; variance is high.
Top-score cluster includes 0-2, but 0-1 and 0-3 remain nearby.
Top score 1-0 is the leading scoreline, but draw paths are also close.
Top-score cluster includes 0-2, but 0-1 and low-score tail remain important.

hit_conditions: All four exact-margin outcomes occur together.
failure_conditions: Any one match lands outside the exact-margin corridor.
maximum_risk_points: Four exact margins are highly fragile.
This depends on tail alignment and cannot be used as coverage.
Theoretical return is high because hit probability is low.

legs.model_support: Model delta is positive versus market, but ordinary win remains medium-high variance.

legs.settlement_condition: DR Congo win by exactly 1 goal.
legs.model_support: Top scores include 1-0 and 2-1, but draw and Uzbekistan paths remain material.

legs.settlement_condition: Croatia and Ghana finish level after 90 minutes.
legs.model_support: Draw is 29.0% in model and market, with 0-0 and 1-1 both near top-score cluster.

hit_conditions: Colombia win, DR Congo win by exactly one, and Croatia-Ghana finish level.
failure_conditions: Any leg misses its narrow result condition.
maximum_risk_points: This combines one underdog win, one exact margin, and one draw.
It is a high-variance branch, not a stabilizer.

legs.model_support: Model delta is positive versus market but Austria remains the slight model 1X2 leader.
Must-win chase path exists, but model still leans DR Congo/draw more than Uzbekistan win.
Ghana transition and set-piece tail exists, but model lists it as a conflict candidate for normal allocation.

hit_conditions: All three underdog-tail results occur together.
failure_conditions: Any favorite or draw scenario interrupts the branch.
maximum_risk_points: This is the lowest-stake tail branch in the reference set.
It contains a conflict leg and cannot be counted as protection.

portfolio_return_notes.compatible_max_return_note: T4 conflicts with most other tickets on exact-margin outcomes; maximum compatible return is not the simple sum.
portfolio_return_notes.minimum_return_warning: No positive return floor exists because all tickets can miss together.

steady_observation_candidates: Jordan +2 handicap win: Jordan real win/draw or Argentina by exactly one.
Panama +2 handicap win: Panama real win/draw or England by exactly one.
Colombia +1 handicap win: Colombia real win or draw.
Croatia -1 handicap loss: Croatia real draw or Ghana real win.
DR Congo -1 handicap loss: DR Congo real draw or Uzbekistan real win.
medium_risk_candidates: Austria win ordinary 1X2: aligned with slight model 1X2 lead, but draw floor is high.
Algeria +1 handicap draw: Austria by exactly one.
Croatia -1 handicap draw: Croatia by exactly one.
DR Congo -1 handicap draw: DR Congo by exactly one.
Panama +2 handicap draw: England by exactly two.
Jordan +2 handicap draw: Argentina by exactly two.
high_return_entertainment_candidates: Four exact-margin handicap chain using only captured handicap prices.
Exact score, total goals and half-full-time are observe-only because odds values were not captured.
deleted_candidates: Portugal ordinary win as a main allocation candidate: model-market delta is negative and red-team warns public/recency premium.
Croatia ordinary win as a main allocation candidate: model-market delta is negative and draw tail is high.
Croatia -1 handicap win: needs Croatia by two-plus and model does not support a strong margin path.
Panama +2 handicap loss: needs England by three-plus and model flags low-score tail.
Jordan +2 handicap loss: needs Argentina by three-plus and model flags rotation and small-win corridors.
Algeria +1 handicap win: market price is below model support.
DR Congo ordinary win as a main allocation candidate: model-market delta is negative and draw floor is live.
live_waiting_items: T-75 official lineups for all six matches.
Final injury, suspension, card and minutes update.
Official China Jingcai live odds with sale status.
Same-source ordinary 1X2, handicap, total goals, exact score and half-full-time odds if those plays are used.
Fresh red-team recheck after lineups and odds.

highly_correlated_paths: T1 and T4 both depend on Jordan-Argentina margin, but they are mutually exclusive between Argentina by one and by two.
T3 and T4 both depend on Panama-England margin, but they are mutually exclusive between England by one-or-less and exactly two.
T2, T4, T5 and T6 all touch Croatia-Ghana; this creates single-match concentration and conflicting result branches.
T2 and T3 both lean against favorite-margin assumptions.
mutual_exclusion: Croatia -1 handicap loss, Croatia -1 handicap draw, Croatia draw and Ghana win cannot all settle together.
Jordan +2 handicap win and Jordan +2 handicap draw cannot settle together.
Panama +2 handicap win and Panama +2 handicap draw cannot settle together.
Algeria win and Algeria +1 handicap draw cannot settle together.
same_model_assumptions: Favorite small-win and low-score assumptions recur in Jordan-Argentina, Panama-England and Croatia-Ghana.
Third-round simultaneous-match state changes can move multiple legs at once.
Low-event Poisson clusters support several legs, so early red cards or penalties can damage multiple tickets.
dispersion_notes: The reference set uses six matches, but Croatia-Ghana appears in four tickets and should be treated as concentrated.
Entertainment tickets do not create independent coverage; they are separate tail branches.
There is no guaranteed fallback scenario and no executable return floor.

high_return_entertainment_warning: High theoretical return is produced by low hit probability and narrow settlement conditions.
Exact-margin, 3-leg and 4-leg chains depend on tail alignment.
These branches must not be increased in size before live gates clear.
Score, total-goal and half-full-time plays remain observe-only until concrete same-source odds are captured.

skip_option.reason: With T-75 lineups missing, final availability partial, market chain incomplete and red-team hold active, skipping or waiting is the cleanest gate-compliant option.
